title: Trump seeks US Supreme Court rehearing on birthright citizenship, says ‘American citizenship not for sale’
content:
• The US Supreme Court, in a 6-3 decision, recently upheld birthright citizenship for children born in the US to parents unlawfully or temporarily present, citing the 14th Amendment's Citizenship Clause.
• US President Donald Trump stated on Wednesday he would immediately seek a rehearing before the US Supreme Court on its birthright citizenship ruling, calling the decision a "miscarriage of justice."
• Trump alleged that signs were advertising birthright citizenship with "deliveries starting at $4000" along the US southern border and in Mexico, claiming billions of dollars would be illegally made through this practice.

title: Trump skips Qatari-gifted jet, uses old Air Force One to leave Turkey after NATO summit: ‘I'm number one on Iran’s list'
content:
• The 'new' Air Force One is a $400 million luxury Boeing 747-8 jet, gifted by the Qatari royal family.
• The Boeing 747-8 jet, now serving as the 'new' Air Force One, was originally delivered in April 2012.
• The retrofitted 'new' Air Force One underwent extensive security and communication upgrades between September 2025 and June 2026.

title: World News Today Live Updates on July 9, 2026 : US launches fresh spate of strikes in Iran, Iranshahr Airport hit; Trump asks if Tehran is ‘worthy of making a deal’
content:
• The news updates cover events as of July 9, 2026, including US strikes in Iran and comments by Donald Trump.
• Livemint provides in-depth analysis on key economic indicators such as GDP, inflation, forex, fiscal deficit, current account deficit (CAD), interest rate cycle, RBI circulars, GST, and the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code (IBC).
• Livemint offers insights into personal finance, covering mutual funds, small savings schemes like PPF and SSY, post office savings, personal loans, credit cards, top bank FDs, real estate, and income tax.

title: US launches fresh spate of strikes on Iran, Iranshahr Airport hit; Trump asks if Tehran is ‘worthy of making a deal’
content:
• The United States launched additional strikes in Iran on Thursday, targeting over 80 sites including Iranshahr Airport, as reported by US Central Command (CENTCOM).
• US President Donald Trump declared the interim deal with Iran 'over' on Wednesday, stating that the US had already 'won militarily' and warned of 'much worse' strikes if aggression continues.
• The US accused Iran of violating the Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) aimed at ceasing hostilities, which prompted the strikes and put Iran peace talks in jeopardy.

title: Vegetarian thali cost rises 5% in June, non-veg thali up 6%: Crisil report
content:
• The cost of a cooked vegetarian thali increased 5% and a non-vegetarian thali rose 6% year-on-year in June 2026, as per Crisil's Roti Rice Report (RRR).
• Tomato prices surged 31% year-on-year, rising to ₹42 per kg in June 2026 from ₹32 per kg in June 2025.
• Vegetable oil and LPG cylinder prices both rose 10% year-on-year in June 2026, primarily due to global supply disruptions caused by the West Asia conflict.

title: India consumer inflation likely breached RBI's 4% target in June, poll shows
content:
• India's consumer inflation (CPI) is expected to have quickened to 4.3% in June, breaching the RBI's 4% target, up from 3.93% in May.
• The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) held its key interest rate unchanged at 5.25% last month.
• India introduced its revised consumer price index (CPI) series with a new base year and updated consumption basket in January.

title: ADB cuts India's FY27 GDP growth aim to 6.6% on higher energy prices
content:
• The Asian Development Bank (ADB) cut India's FY27 GDP growth aim to 6.6%.
• ADB revised India's FY27 inflation forecast upward to 5.2% from 4.5% projected in April.
• ADB retained its FY28 growth forecast for India at 7.3%.

title: CBDT exempts NCCL settlement fund from tax
content:
• The Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) has exempted the National Clearing Corporation Ltd (NCCL) settlement fund from tax.
• The tax exemption for NCCL's fund was notified on Tuesday, utilizing transition provisions under the new income-tax law to continue a benefit available under the earlier Act.
• NCCL continues to be recognized as a clearing corporation by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI), maintaining settlement guarantee funds as a financial buffer.

title: Govt seeks proposals for coal gasification projects under Rs 37,500-cr incentive scheme
content:
• The government's incentive scheme for "Promotion of Surface Coal/Lignite Gasification Projects" has a total financial outlay of Rs 37,500 crore.
• The "Scheme for Promotion of Surface Coal/Lignite Gasification Projects" was approved by the Government on 13 May 2026.
• The scheme aims to promote surface coal/lignite gasification for producing syngas and downstream value-added products like synthetic natural gas (SNG), urea, and methanol, to enhance energy security and reduce import dependence.

title: IMF lowers India’s FY27 growth outlook, retains status as fastest-growing economy
content:
• The International Monetary Fund (IMF) forecasts India's economy to grow 7% in 2026 and 6.4% in 2027 on a calendar year basis.
• For FY27, the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) estimates India's growth at 6.6%, which aligns with the World Bank's raised forecast from 6.5% to 6.6%.
• Globally, the IMF lowered its 2026 growth forecast to 3% from 3.1% due to the Middle East conflict, while raising its 2027 forecast to 3.4% from 3.2%.
